items.caption: Expressive Talent
items.description: Two POV skits for Meraki Agency, different scenes but same energy — the timing and reactions feel real all the way to the punchline.
items.description_id: Dua skit POV buat Meraki Agency, scene beda tapi energinya sama — timing dan reaksinya kerasa natural sampai ke punchline-nya.

items.caption: Informative Talent
items.description: Hosting for Botomotif on two different cars — kept it clear and easygoing so it feels like a chat, not a spec sheet.
items.description_id: Host buat Botomotif di dua mobil beda — dibawain santai dan jelas biar berasa ngobrol, bukan kayak baca brosur.

items.caption: Cinematic Framing
items.description: Company profile shoot for PT Hisotex — lighting and camera moves picked to make the brand look premium on screen.
items.description_id: Syuting company profile buat PT Hisotex — pencahayaan dan gerakan kamera dipilih biar brand-nya keliatan premium di layar.
items.title: PT HISOTEX

items.caption: Subject Framing
items.description: Automotive feature shoot — framed so both the car and the talent look clean straight out of camera, no heavy grading needed.
items.description_id: Syuting fitur otomotif — di-frame biar mobil dan talent-nya udah keliatan bersih langsung dari kamera, gak perlu banyak polesan lagi.
items.title: Bawa Ford Mustang ke Tongkrongan Buna… Endingnya Gue Ditelepon Bahlil Lahadalia?! 😳🔥

categories.title: Short Form Edit
categories.blurb: Reels & shorts, built to hook fast

items.caption: Aesthetic Typography
items.description: Two Reels built around typography — the text moves right on beat with the audio so it hooks you before you notice why.
items.description_id: Dua Reels yang mainnya di tipografi — gerakan teksnya pas banget sama beat audio, jadi nge-hook duluan sebelum kamu sadar kenapa.

items.caption: Elegant Shoot + Edit
items.description: Two projects for Botomotif, shot and edited start to finish — framed carefully on set, graded so each car looks as premium as it should.
items.description_id: Dua project buat Botomotif dari syuting sampai edit final — framing-nya diperhatiin di lokasi, warnanya digrade biar tiap mobil keliatan sepremium mestinya.

items.caption: Edited for Big Creators
items.description: Editing for Edward Halim — keeping a long video watchable start to finish, so people don't just click, they stay.
items.description_id: Edit buat Edward Halim — video panjangnya tetap enak ditonton dari awal sampai akhir, biar penonton nggak cuma mampir tapi juga betah.
items.title: Nyobain Semua Scam Di Turki!

items.caption: Clean Vlog Edit
items.description: Vlog edit for VIP Koocester Car Meet — clean cuts, relaxed pace, story that's easy to follow all the way through.
items.description_id: Edit vlog VIP Koocester Car Meet — potongan bersih, pacing santai, cerita yang gampang diikutin dari awal sampai habis.
items.title: Di Undang VIP Koocester, Satu Room Sama Gabriel Rey… Mobil 2M Gue Nyempil di Antara Supercar 😳
